description: Main window: full capability set incl. native dialogs and clipboard read/write. Detached per-monitor / popped-out pane windows get a reduced set (see panes.json) — they render only a terminal mirror (DetachedView) and never need the dialogs. The opener and notification plugins are deliberately NOT listed: both are driven from Rust (app.opener() / app.notification(), and the custom open_url/open_path commands), where the ACL does not apply, so a webview grant would only widen the attack surface.
